Comfortable Accommodations: Plougastel House B&B in Westport offers private bathrooms with free WiFi in public areas. Each room includes a tea and coffee maker, hairdryer, dining table, work desk, free toiletries, shower, carpeted floor, TV, electric kettle, and wardrobe.
Delicious Breakfast: Guests enjoy a continental or full English/Irish breakfast with warm dishes, juice, fresh pastries, and fruits.
Convenient Location: Westport Train Station is a 12-minute walk away. Nearby attractions include Clew Bay Heritage Centre (3.6 km), Ballintubber Abbey and Rockfleet Castle (19 km), and Ireland West Knock Airport (53 km). Boating is available in the surroundings.
